# oidc-tls-skip-verify-and-additional-urls

oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify plus additionalUrls from argocd-cm sample

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/auth/oidc-tls-skip-verify-and-additional-urls` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  url: https://argo-cd-demo.argoproj.io
  additionalUrls: |
    - https://argo-cd-demo2.argoproj.io
    - https://argocd-alt.example.com
  oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify: "true"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    oidc:
      insecureSkipVerify: true
    urls:
    - https://argo-cd-demo.argoproj.io
    - https://argo-cd-demo2.argoproj.io
    - https://argocd-alt.example.com
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  additionalUrls: |
    - https://argo-cd-demo2.argoproj.io
    - https://argocd-alt.example.com
  oidc.config: |
    {}
  oidc.tls.insecure.skip.verify: "true"
  url: https://argo-cd-demo.argoproj.io
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
